# FDF Blog

## [Inclusive Spelling 🐝](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/inclusive-spelling-%f0%9f%90%9d/)

Inclusive Spelling bee 🐝 aims at reducing the number of out-of-school children in Nigeria. Inclusive Education has to be embraced by all The majority of children with disabilities are not able to access equitable education because we do not have enough Special...

[read more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/inclusive-spelling-%f0%9f%90%9d/)

## [SPELLING BEE 3.0](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/spelling-bee-3-0/)

[read more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/spelling-bee-3-0/)

## [FDF@6 ANNIVERSARY WEBINAR](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/fdf6-anniversary-webinar/)

Fdf@6 Join us 12th of June as we celebrate our 6th anniversary of impacting lives through educational programs, advocacy, empowerment and bridging communication gap for the deaf community with sign language. Join the webinar, themed "ADVOCACY IS NOT ENOUGH " Time:...

[read more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/fdf6-anniversary-webinar/)

## [FDF Customized hoodie](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/fdf-customized-hoodie/)

Fdf customized hoodie advocacy is not enough You can also join the advocacy by getting our customized hoodie designer at 6,000 Naira. donate or pay to Zenith Bank: 1016907109 Friends of the deaf Int'l foundation And send your payments with "HOODIE" as narration to...

[read more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/fdf-customized-hoodie/)

## [Volunteer with us to transform lives](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/volunteer-with-us-to-transform-lives/)

Volunteering for special needs children is a profoundly rewarding experience that holds the power to transform lives. As fdf volunteer, you play a crucial role in providing much-needed support, love, and encouragement to these incredible deaf children. You become a...

[read more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/volunteer-with-us-to-transform-lives/)

## [Advocacy not enough; do more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/advocacy-not-enough-do-more/)

Fdf school project Our advocacy is not enough to effect the desired changes we want in our society but you can do more. Giving your services to promote the educational needs of children with special needs is a powerful way to create positive change in their lives....

[read more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/advocacy-not-enough-do-more/)

Prioritizing Deaf education in Nigeria: Stakeholders responsibility and public participation Prioritizing Deaf education in Nigeria: Stakeholders' responsibility and public participation Join us live commemorating our 5th solid years of relentlessly advocating for...

[![HURRAY! FDF @5](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODdhAQABAPAAAMPDwwAAACwAAAAAAQABAAACAkQBADs=)![HURRAY! FDF @5](https://i0.wp.com/friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/FB_IMG_1654856607430.jpg?resize=400%2C250&ssl=1)](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/hurray-fdf-5/)

## [HURRAY! FDF @5](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/hurray-fdf-5/)

Hurray! Friends of the Deaf Int. Foundation celebrating its 5th anniversary years of consistently advocating for Educational rights of the Deaf children and promoting inclusion of all persons with disabilities. In the mood of celebrating our 5th anniversary We need...

[read more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/hurray-fdf-5/)

[![A WALK FOR SIGN LANGUAGE RECOGNITION](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODdhAQABAPAAAMPDwwAAACwAAAAAAQABAAACAkQBADs=)![A WALK FOR SIGN LANGUAGE RECOGNITION](https://i0.wp.com/friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/IMG-20210917-WA0001.jpg?resize=400%2C250&ssl=1)](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/a-walk-for-sign-language-recognition/)

## [A WALK FOR SIGN LANGUAGE RECOGNITION](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/a-walk-for-sign-language-recognition/)

In the mood of celebrating the international day of sign languages. We at FDF decided to embark on walk for life campaign to further make sign language more recognized as a way of bridging communication gap for the Deaf people in Nigeria in collaboration with CODAH...

[read more](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/a-walk-for-sign-language-recognition/)
